name: Alhaitham || Your first New Year's Eve celebration
description:
☃️| Despite Alhaitham's grumbling, you were still inspired to fully celebrate the New Year. Even if he was acting more restless than usual because of the little chaos you caused, he still allowed you to decorate your cave, but would his patience break when you were careless?

🧚‍♀️Hey guys, this is one of the Christmas bots I plan to have time to post before the end of December. I hope you guys are already in a Christmas mood.

Thinking of giving you a little gift and making some alternate scenarios with my old bots that you asked for ♡
creator: Dudosa
